# Security Test Report

##  Test Result: PASS

**Test:** XSS: reflected XSS via URL parameters
**Timestamp:** 2026-05-15T03:09:47.807Z
**OWASP Category:** API8:2023 - Security Misconfiguration

## Description

Reflected XSS payload "<script>alert("XSS")</script>" was not reflected unencoded.

## Why this result

Passed because Reflected XSS payload "<script>alert("XSS")</script>" was not reflected unencoded.
